title: NBArmors HD TP
description:
The official HD Texture Pack for my mod NBArmors.
This texture pack modifies the appearance of the armor of my mod, to a more HD texture.
55 HD armors for now...
More detail in the texture for the mod.
body:
The official HD Texture Pack for my mod NBArmors.
This texture pack modifies the appearance of the armor of my mod, to a more HD texture.

55 HD armors for now...

More detail in the texture for the mod.

This texture pack does not modify behaviors of minecraft, it is only visual.
